verses.text: God calls them to keep justice and do righteousness, blessing the man who keeps the sabbath and keeps his hand from evil. Salvation shapes conduct. Those who await God's deliverance live holy, just lives now.

God calls them to keep justice and do righteousness, blessing the man who keeps the sabbath and keeps his hand from evil. Salvation shapes conduct. Those who await God's deliverance live holy, just lives now.

Let no foreigner or eunuch feel shut out; to such God gives 'a name better than of sons and of daughters,' an everlasting name. None is too marginal for grace. God welcomes the outsider who clings to Him.

Let no foreigner or eunuch feel shut out; to such God gives 'a name better than of sons and of daughters,' an everlasting name. None is too marginal for grace. God welcomes the outsider who clings to Him.

Let no foreigner or eunuch feel shut out; to such God gives 'a name better than of sons and of daughters,' an everlasting name. None is too marginal for grace. God welcomes the outsider who clings to Him.

The strangers who join the LORD He brings to His holy mountain, for 'mine house shall be called an house of prayer for all people.' His grace reaches the nations. Jesus quoted this when cleansing the temple, defending its worldwide call.

The strangers who join the LORD He brings to His holy mountain, for 'mine house shall be called an house of prayer for all people.' His grace reaches the nations. Jesus quoted this when cleansing the temple, defending its worldwide call.

The watchmen are blind, 'greedy dogs which can never have enough,' caring only for their own gain and ease. Faithless leaders are condemned. Shepherds who feed themselves while the flock strays answer to God.
